$comment: Security headers for the static SPA serve (spec 10). The token-in-localStorage decision (research R2 / spec Assumptions) is justified ONLY in the presence of CSP + security headers — this file supplies them, matching the constitution's edge-protection requirement. NOTE: connect-src must include the real backend API origin in each deployment (replace the placeholder below or template it at build time).

headers.value: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://localhost:8000; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'; font-src 'self'; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
